title: Legacy Sprint
body: # Sprint ![Available for Ornithe](https://github.com/TheLoopProject/loop-badges/blob/main/badges/64x/ornithe/Available%20for%20Ornithe_64h.png?raw=true) ![Requires Ornithe's Standard Libraries](https://github.com/TheLoopProject/loop-badges/blob/main/badges/64x/ornithe/Requires%20OSL%20(Short)_64h.png?raw=true) ![Supports fabric](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true) ![Works On Quilt](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support Forge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support LiteLoader](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/liteloader_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support Risugami's Modloader](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/risugamis-modloader_64h.png?raw=true) This is a mod that backports the sprint key to older versions of Minecraft. You can customize the keybind for sprinting on the keybinds menu, and run like you never had before\*! It's as shrimple as that! ##### *except if you have run in modern versions ## 🏳️‍🌈-Pridecraft Have you ever thought that your game is too boring and straight? Well, that's no more! Get [Pridepack](https://pridecraft.gay/pridepack) *(or [it's variations](https://git.pridecraft.gay))* today!
